clauses.text: Provider shall migrate Client's on-premises infrastructure to Microsoft Azure cloud platform.
Cloud Readiness Assessment Report, Azure Architecture Design Document, Migration Runbook, migrated infrastructure, Security Compliance Report, Knowledge Transfer.
Total project fee: $285,000. Payment: 25% on execution, 25% Phase 2, 40% Phase 3, 10% on acceptance.
Client acceptance testing period: 10 business days from delivery.
Provider warrants deliverables will conform to specifications for ninety (90) days following final acceptance.
